examples: On the third day, as he rode daringly near the wall, confident in his hard-tried luck, a bolt from a crossbow struck him in the left shoulder by the neck.
Inspired by this good omen, the Greek navy daringly engaged and defeated the Persian fleet at the battle of Salamis.
Nidal, with his cheeky smile, had crawled around on all fours pretending to be a cat, miaowing daringly round the legs of the girls.
More daringly yet, in 1835 he married an Englishwoman who was not noble, Catholic or rich.
Abbey National, daringly, lets customers calculate the cost of a mortgage or a loan.
